title: Fast Sling Puck Winner - Wooden Slingshot Hockey Game, Fun Paced Board Game for Parent-Child Interaction
features: Parent child interactive catapult board game: Sports board games are very suitable for family and social activities with children and family. Exercise children's hand eye coordination and concentration skills

Quick slingshot bouncing game: This two in one interactive board game provides exciting quick actions. Use a catapult to shoot the ice hockey ball over the chessboard and attempt to shoot it into the opponent's goal, then clear the chessboard to win

High quality: The fast sling ice hockey game is made of environmentally friendly wooden materials, which are safe, environmentally friendly, beautiful, and durable. It is very suitable for adult and child family reunions and is an ideal choice for parent-child games and parties

Perfect design: Hockey board game is lightweight, compact in structure, and easy to carry. Smooth wooden frame, easy to slide when playing. No battery required. Just take out the ice hockey game and play with family and friends
Lightboard Game: A new and exciting ice hockey throwing tabletop game for the entire family! Perfect for family entertainment, birthday parties, Christmas gifts, game nights, camping trips, etc
description: Product description A new and exciting ice hockey throwing table game for the whole family! Lightweight, small in size, and easy to carry. You can play on the table or on the floor. Suitable for parent-child games and gatherings. Our wooden hockey table game is made of natural solid wood, which is safe, durable, sturdy, and lightweight, so you can play hockey endlessly on it for many years. Desktop two in one ice hockey games allow children to engage in interesting interactions and guide their friends to socialize in a fun and positive way. Game rules: 2 players, prepare a chessboard with 5 ice hockey players each To start the game, place 5 balls on each side of the chessboard. Slide both ends of the rubber strip into the side slots to secure it in place The player uses one hand and an elastic band to guide the ice hockey ball through the slot and shoot towards the other side Both sides face each other in an interesting way, and the first one to send all 10 ice hockey pucks to the other is the winner! Safety Warning No
